accepted.reason: Host-marginalized event likelihood with log-domain accumulation and weak-lensing terms is a high-value numeric kernel.
DTW table construction/backtracking and ambiguity resolution provide strong dynamic-programming optimization signal.
AND/OR linearization constraints and signed-variable summation are compact algorithmic kernels used in optimization pipelines.
RK4 integration of coupled pendulum dynamics is a rich numerical loop kernel with clear performance relevance.
Poisson blending RHS vector construction over masked neighborhoods is a practical stencil-style image kernel.

Fragment appears incomplete/truncated in source snapshot and is not reliable as standalone training data.
Large acoustic simulation pipeline tied to project geometry classes and infrastructure, not a compact standalone kernel.
